title: ozothamnus cassiope
intro: Ozothamnus cassiope, also known as the New South Wales sweet-bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ozothamnus cassiope include its ability to support the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Ozothamnus cassiope can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for its medicinal and health benefits.
